optimizer.message: CONVERGENCE: RELATIVE REDUCTION OF F <= FACTR*EPSMCH

notes: home_advantage_elo is fitted on real matches where the listed home team plays on its own soil (neutral=False). World Cup 2026 group fixtures are all treated as neutral_venue=True in match_forecast. The host's +50 Elo bonus (TournamentTeam.rating) is a separate, transparent heuristic and was not estimated by this fit, so host-specific World Cup forecasts retain that limitation.
rho is the Dixon-Coles low-score correlation term; rho=0 recovers the independent-Poisson model shipped before this fit.
